reviews.comment:
Unos cracks los muchachos de allí,  pasé en moto y fueron muy atentos. Impecable la estación,  me llamó la atención la limpieza.  Excelente atención 👏 👍 gracias

(Translated by Google)
The guys there are fantastic! I stopped by on my motorbike and they were very helpful. The station was spotless; I was particularly impressed by its cleanliness. Excellent service! 👏 👍 Thanks!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1dm9fbmtRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Mala ate cion , se hacen los que estan apurados y no te brindan informacion , no tratan bien a los turistas , una  erdadera lastima para ese gran pueblo

(Translated by Google)
Poor service, they act like they're in a hurry and don't give you any information, they don't treat tourists well, a real shame for such a great town

Muy amable  y atentos

(Translated by Google)
Very kind and attentive

reviews.comment:
Dentro de todo ACEPTABLE, por que por temporada se agota el combustible y como siempre quedamos varados en atractivo turístico como lo es el Pueblo de Cachi

(Translated by Google)
Overall, it's ACCEPTABLE, because fuel runs out seasonally and, as always, we get stranded in a tourist attraction like the town of Cachi.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1cHIzcmZnEAE

reviews.comment:
No nos querían cargar combustible a pesar de ser la única estación de servicio disponible hasta San antonio de los cobres “por el Abra del Acay”. Fuimos a la mañana sabiendo que el camión pasaba por la madrugada, pero el que atendía dijo que ya infinia diesel no había más (mentira porque los dueños del hotel mas tarde pudieron cargar y nos prestaron un bidón)

(Translated by Google)
They refused to fill up our tanks, even though it was the only gas station available until San Antonio de los Cobres "via Abra del Acay." We went in the morning knowing the truck passed by in the early hours, but the attendant said they were out of Infinia diesel (a lie, because the hotel owners were later able to fill up and lent us a jerrycan).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1eHVUNExBEAE

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) It's not comparable to the large gas stations in other cities, but since there aren't any other gas stations, you have to be grateful for what's there.

The service was friendly, and at least there was gas, which isn't always guaranteed in this region during the peak travel season in winter.

(Original)
Sie ist zwar nicht vergleichbar mit den großen Tankstellen in anderen Städten, aber da es keine andere Tankstelle gibt, muss man froh sein über das was es da ist.
Der Service war freundlich und es gab zumindest Benzin, was in dieser Region zur Hauptreisezeit in den Winterferien nicht immer garantiert ist.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1NnRURXZRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Super amables !!! Me ayudaron con los fluidos del auto. Baños limpios. Ojo, no había gasoil

(Translated by Google)
